---
title: "Open Science Radio"
date: 2018-05-14
subtitle: "An interview with scientific board member Anne-Laure Boulesteix and the managing director Felix Schönbrodt about the foundation of the LMU Open Science Center."
categories: ["Interviews"]

template: templates/news-template.html
filters:
  - templates/process-news-yaml.lua
---


<p>Listen to the interview:<br><a href="https://www.openscienceradio.org/2018/05/14/osr124-open-science-center-at-lmu-munich-en/">https://www.openscienceradio.org/2018/05/14/osr124-open-science-center-at-lmu-munich-en/</a></p>
<div class="g-clear"></div>
